title: Teams with the most World Cup titles - FIFA
content: 1st) Brazil – 5 titles 2nd) Germany – 4 titles 2nd) Italy – 4 titles 4th) Argentina – 3 titles 5th) France – 2 titles 5th) Uruguay – 2
